name: sde-interview-script-skill
description: Generate concise senior SDE interview scripts and direct Excalidraw visual links from technical excerpts.

interface.shortDescription: Concise SDE scripts plus Excalidraw links.
interface.longDescription: Turn technical interview excerpts into short Chinese-first senior SDE speaking scripts, then export a compact Excalidraw visual link when tools are available.
defaultPrompt: Create a concise SDE answer and Excalidraw script card.
Turn this excerpt into a 90-second interview answer.
Draw a monochrome Excalidraw card with the script.
